texto: On the whole, when I travel to different countries, I like to find the hidden places, so I tend to avoid the cities - but in terms of the ease of getting about, finding what you need, the excitement, that undercurrent of whatever you want it to be, it's got to be London.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Will Tudor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “On the whole, when I travel to different countries, I like to find the hidden places, so I tend t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, want, london pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e termino.
